description: Placeholder. Exercises single-tool selection and argument emission. Replace with a real tool definition captured from frontend/src/app/api/chat/route.ts.
system: You are a trading assistant with access to tools. When the user asks for data about a specific ticker, you MUST call the get_quote tool exactly once with the ticker symbol. Do not answer from memory.
user: Can you pull me the latest quote for NVDA?

function.name: get_quote
function.description: Fetch the latest quote for a single stock ticker.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol, uppercase, e.g. NVDA or AAPL.
